heading: Support Comparison
body:
The following table provides a comparison of the different Atlas support plans:

| Support Services            | Basic                                 | Developer                                                                                                                                      | Pro                                                                                                                                                                                              | Enterprise                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Response Times              | N/A                                   | First response within 8 hours.                                                                                                                 | First response options from 2 hours.                                                                                                                                                             | First response options from 15 mins to 2 hours.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Technical Support           | Chat Support Monday-Friday            | 24/7 Support via Case PortalChat Support Monday-FridayEnd-to-end database support (advice on data best practices and performance improvements) | 24/7 Support via Case PortalChat Support Monday-FridayEnd-to-end database support (advice on data best practices and performance improvements)Phone SupportProactive customer success management | 24/7 Support via Case PortalChat Support Monday-FridayEnd-to-end database support (advice on data best practices and performance improvements)Phone SupportTailored white glove support and customer success management |
| Customer Resources          | Docs, FAQ, Community Forums           | Docs, FAQ, Community ForumsKnowledge Base                                                                                                      | Docs, FAQ, Community ForumsKnowledge Base                                                                                                                                                        | Docs, FAQ, Community ForumsKnowledge Base                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Training                    | Online training at MongoDB University | Online training at MongoDB University                                                                                                          | Online training at MongoDB UniversityAccess to MongoDB University for Teams                                                                                                                      | Online training at MongoDB UniversityAccess to MongoDB University for Teams                                                                                                                                             |
| Escalation Managers         | N/A                                   | N/A                                                                                                                                            | Dedicated Escalation Manager for urgent emergencies                                                                                                                                              | Dedicated Escalation Manager for urgent emergencies                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Event and Launch Management | N/A                                   | N/A                                                                                                                                            | Proactively ensure MongoDB Support aware of special circumstance                                                                                                                                 | Proactively ensure MongoDB Support aware of special circumstance                                                                                                                                                        |
| Customer Success Management | N/A                                   | N/A                                                                                                                                            | Onboarding, Check-ins, to Quarterly Business Reviews                                                                                                                                             | Onboarding, Check-ins, to Quarterly Business Reviews                                                                                                                                                                    |
